raw_consumer_statement: I reported fraudulent activity on my credit card in XX/XX/XXXX. I notified Barclay about the fraud via telephone call. They Sent me a new card. Since then I have received nothing in the mail nor a phone call acknowledging the fraud or that they are working on crediting the account. I called on XX/XX/XXXX and they advised they're working on it. Now XXXX months after my follow up call I am still waiting for a credit of the charges or at the very least, an update to my fraud review. It's not a large amount so I'm not sure why it is taking so long.
